title: Phone & Digital
description: Stay connected in German: phone calls, Wi-Fi, SIM cards, and messaging.
situation: Staying connected: making calls, getting online, buying a SIM, and basic tech vocabulary.

phrases.german: Kann ich mein Handy hier aufladen?
phrases.english: Can I charge my phone here?
phrases.pronunciation: kahn ikh mine HEN-dee heer OWF-lah-den
phrases.tip: Germans call a mobile phone a 'Handy'.

phrases.english: Do you have a charging cable?

phrases.german: Können Sie mir Ihre Nummer geben?
phrases.english: Can you give me your number?
phrases.pronunciation: KUR-nen zee meer EE-ruh NOO-mer GAY-ben

phrases.tip: 'anrufen' splits: the 'an' jumps to the end of the sentence.
WhatsApp is by far the most common messaging app in Germany.
